# Sub-Task 7 — Performance Library Images Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Close the Performance Library Restructure mega-phase by adding 6 new image templates (Gemini-generated by user, dropped into `public/performance/`), wiring 3 of them to live entries (Albuterol inhaled-variant, RU58841 default, L-Carnitine aq-variant), and shipping a single megapush tagged `v0.25-perf-restructure-complete`.

**Architecture:** Static-asset addition + 3 data-edits + 1 script extension. No new React components, no new validator rules, no shape changes. The existing `EntryImage.jsx` 3-source `<picture>` chain (AVIF → WebP → PNG) handles the new files automatically once they exist in `public/performance/`. The new `VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES` mechanism in `update-library-images.mjs` uses a per-entry variant-id-anchored regex to safely rebind variant images without touching the oral-variant of the same entry (critical edge-case: Albuterol oral+inhaled currently share `tablet-pile-white.png`).

**Tech Stack:** Node 20.18, Vite 5, React 18, Tailwind 3, Workbox (`vite-plugin-pwa`), Sharp (in `scripts/convert-images.mjs`), Gemini Imagen/Image-mode (image generation, user-side).

**Pre-shipped spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md` (10 sections, 6 Gemini prompts, 2-style-family visual guide)

---

## Phase A — Gemini Image Generation (User-Side Bench)

**Owner:** User (you generate the PNGs in Gemini; I cannot generate images).

**Coordination point:** User signals "all 6 PNGs dropped, run the pipeline" before Phase B begins.

### Task A1: Generate 6 PNG templates with Gemini

**Files:**
- Create (user-side): `public/performance/nasal-spray-clear.png`
- Create (user-side): `public/performance/inhaler-asthma.png`
- Create (user-side): `public/performance/oral-syringe.png`
- Create (user-side): `public/performance/transdermal-patch.png`
- Create (user-side): `public/performance/topical-solution-clear.png`
- Create (user-side): `public/performance/ampoule-glass.png`

- [ ] **Step 1: Open the spec for prompt reference**

Open `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md` in your editor. The 6 Gemini prompts are in §3.1–3.6, each with a positive prompt and a negative prompt. The visual style guide is in §2 (two style families: Container/white-bg and Solid/black-bg).

- [ ] **Step 2: For each template, run the Gemini prompt**

In Gemini (Imagen 3 or Gemini 2.5 image-mode), paste the §3.x positive prompt as the main prompt and the negative prompt in the negative-prompt field. Generate at 1024×1024 square format. Expected per-template generation time: 1-5 minutes (single attempt) to 15-20 minutes (with regenerations).

Per-template style reminders:
- **Style A (Container — nasal-spray, inhaler, oral-syringe, topical-solution, ampoule)**: white background `#ffffff`, soft cast-shadow beneath subject, photorealistic 3D-render aesthetic
- **Style B (Solid — transdermal-patch only)**: solid black background `#000000`, macro key-light, shallow DoF, slight three-quarter tilt

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify each PNG against §4 anti-AI-slop checklist before saving**

For each generated image, run the §4 universal checklist (no text/labels/extra props, natural colors, 1024×1024 PNG) AND the relevant style-family checklist (white bg + cast-shadow for Style A, black bg + shallow DoF for Style B). If any check fails, regenerate with a refined prompt.

**Critical failure modes to watch:**
- Wrong background color (#1 failure mode — Gemini sometimes adds gradient or wrong color)
- Visible text/numerals/labels on the subject
- Extra props in frame (pills next to inhaler, multiple objects)
- Surreal lighting / neon / glow effects
- Style A image rendered as macro-photo aesthetic instead of 3D-render (or vice versa)

- [ ] **Step 4: Side-by-side comparison check**

For each finished PNG, open it side-by-side with the matching reference template (named in the spec §3.x "Style reference:" line). Verify visual consistency:
- Style A nasal-spray ↔ `public/performance/water-vial.png` (white bg + cast-shadow style)
- Style A inhaler ↔ `public/performance/cream-tube-white.png` (white bg + cast-shadow style)
- Style A oral-syringe ↔ `public/performance/cream-tube-white.png` (white bg + diagonal orientation)
- Style A topical-solution ↔ `public/pharmaceutical/minoxidil-topical.png` (dropper-bottle, clear glass instead of amber)
- Style A ampoule ↔ `public/performance/water-vial.png` (white bg + cast-shadow style)
- Style B patch ↔ `public/performance/blister-white-oval.png` (black bg + tilt + shallow DoF)

If side-by-side comparison reveals stylistic mismatch (different lighting feel, different background, different render-aesthetic), regenerate.

- [ ] **Step 5: Drop all 6 PNGs into `public/performance/`**

Save each verified PNG to the exact filename specified in §5 of the spec:
```
public/performance/nasal-spray-clear.png
public/performance/inhaler-asthma.png
public/performance/oral-syringe.png
public/performance/transdermal-patch.png
public/performance/topical-solution-clear.png
public/performance/ampoule-glass.png
```

- [ ] **Step 6: Verify all 6 PNGs present**

Run:
```bash
ls -la public/performance/nasal-spray-clear.png public/performance/inhaler-asthma.png public/performance/oral-syringe.png public/performance/transdermal-patch.png public/performance/topical-solution-clear.png public/performance/ampoule-glass.png
```

Expected: all 6 files listed with non-zero size (typical 1024×1024 PNG with clean bg: 30-150 KiB each).

If any file missing, regenerate that one before proceeding to Phase B.

- [ ] **Step 7: Signal "ready for Phase B"**

User tells me the 6 PNGs are dropped; I begin Phase B inline.

## Phase B — AVIF + WebP Conversion

### Task B1: Run convert-images.mjs to emit AVIF + WebP variants

**Files:**
- Modify (auto-emit): `public/performance/*.{webp,avif}` (12 new files)

- [ ] **Step 1: Inspect the existing convert-images.mjs to understand scope**

```bash
head -60 scripts/convert-images.mjs
```

Expected: see Sharp-based pipeline emitting `.webp` (Q80) and `.avif` (Q60, effort=4) for every `.png` in covered directories. Confirm `public/performance/` is in the scan list. If NOT in the scan list (legacy script targeting only `peptides/`), add `'public/performance'` to the directory list before running.

- [ ] **Step 2: Run convert-images.mjs**

Run:
```bash
node scripts/convert-images.mjs
```

Expected output: 6 PNG files processed, 12 new files emitted (6 `.webp` + 6 `.avif`). Total processing time ~15-30 seconds for 6 images.

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify all 18 files present**

Run:
```bash
ls -la public/performance/nasal-spray-clear.* public/performance/inhaler-asthma.* public/performance/oral-syringe.* public/performance/transdermal-patch.* public/performance/topical-solution-clear.* public/performance/ampoule-glass.*
```

Expected: 18 lines (6 templates × 3 formats). Typical sizes:
- PNG: 30-150 KiB each
- WebP: 15-40 KiB each (Q80)
- AVIF: 5-20 KiB each (Q60)

- [ ] **Step 4: Verify image dimensions are 1024×1024**

Run (PowerShell-friendly):
```bash
node -e "const sharp=require('sharp'); ['nasal-spray-clear','inhaler-asthma','oral-syringe','transdermal-patch','topical-solution-clear','ampoule-glass'].forEach(async n => { const m = await sharp('public/performance/'+n+'.png').metadata(); console.log(n+': '+m.width+'x'+m.height); });"
```

Expected: all 6 lines show `1024x1024`. If any deviation, regenerate that PNG in Phase A.

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit Phase B output**

```bash
git add public/performance/nasal-spray-clear.* public/performance/inhaler-asthma.* public/performance/oral-syringe.* public/performance/transdermal-patch.* public/performance/topical-solution-clear.* public/performance/ampoule-glass.*
git commit -m "feat(perf-images): add 6 new image templates (nasal-spray, inhaler, oral-syringe, transdermal-patch, topical-solution, ampoule)

Sub-Task 7 Phase B: PNG+WebP+AVIF emit for 6 templates.
Generated via Gemini per spec §3.1-3.6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

## Phase C — Script Extension

### Task C1: Extend update-library-images.mjs with VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES mechanism

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/update-library-images.mjs` (add map + helper fn + per-entry call)

- [ ] **Step 1: Read the existing script to understand the call chain**

Run:
```bash
cat scripts/update-library-images.mjs
```

Confirm the existing structure:
- `PERFORMANCE_IMAGES` map (id → image path) drives meta + per-lang body top-level `image:` field
- `VARIANT_REPLACEMENTS` array (literal from→to) handles variant-level image swaps via global string-replace
- `processLibrary(libDir, imageMap)` iterates: updates meta + per-lang body files
- `applyVariantReplacements(path)` is called inside `processLibrary` for every body file

- [ ] **Step 2: Add `'ru58841'` mapping to PERFORMANCE_IMAGES**

In `scripts/update-library-images.mjs`, locate the `PERFORMANCE_IMAGES` const (around line 8). Append the new mapping at the end of the object (before the closing `}`):

```javascript
const PERFORMANCE_IMAGES = {
  'testosterone-info': '/performance/oil-vial-yellow.png',
  // ... existing entries unchanged ...
  'dnp-info': '/performance/tablet-pile-yellow.png',
  'ru58841': '/performance/topical-solution-clear.png',
}
```

This rebinds RU58841's top-level `entry.image` field in BOTH the meta-index (`src/data/libraries/performance/index.js`) AND all 3 per-lang body files (`entries/{hu,en,pl}/ru58841.js`) from `/performance/tablet-pile-white.png` to `/performance/topical-solution-clear.png`.

- [ ] **Step 3: Add VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES map**

After the `VARIANT_REPLACEMENTS` array (around line 55), add a new const:

```javascript
// Per-entry variant-image overrides — anchored by variantId block boundary
// to safely rebind a specific variant's image WITHOUT touching other variants
// of the same entry. Used for: Albuterol oral+inhaled share tablet-pile-white,
// L-Carnitine oral on tablet-pile-white + aq on water-vial.
const VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES = {
  'albuterol': {
    'inhaled': '/performance/inhaler-asthma.png',
  },
  'l-carnitine': {
    'aq': '/performance/ampoule-glass.png',
  },
}
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Add applyVariantImageOverrides helper function**

After `applyVariantReplacements` function (around line 113), add:

```javascript
async function applyVariantImageOverrides(path, entryId, overrides) {
  if (!overrides) return
  const src = await readFile(path, 'utf8')
  let out = src
  let localEdits = 0
  for (const [variantId, newImagePath] of Object.entries(overrides)) {
    // Match: "id": "<variantId>" ... "image": "<oldPath>"
    // Anchored to the variant block by starting at the "id" field
    // and stopping at the next "},". Captures group 1 = block prefix
    // (everything before "image":), then replaces just the image value.
    const blockRegex = new RegExp(
      `("id":\\s*"${variantId.replace(/[-/.]/g, '\\$&')}"[\\s\\S]*?)"image":\\s*"[^"]+"`,
      'g'
    )
    const next = out.replace(blockRegex, `$1"image": "${newImagePath}"`)
    if (next !== out) {
      out = next
      localEdits++
    }
  }
  if (out !== src) {
    await writeFile(path, out, 'utf8')
    totalFiles++
    totalEdits += localEdits
    console.log(`  variant-override updated: ${path} (${localEdits} edit${localEdits === 1 ? '' : 's'})`)
  }
}
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Wire applyVariantImageOverrides into processLibrary**

In the existing `processLibrary` function, locate the per-lang loop (around line 119). After the `applyVariantReplacements(fullPath)` call, add the new call:

```javascript
async function processLibrary(libDir, imageMap) {
  // 1. Meta file
  await updateMeta(join(libDir, 'index.js'), imageMap)
  // 2. Per-lang entry bodies
  for (const lang of ['hu', 'en', 'pl']) {
    const dir = join(libDir, 'entries', lang)
    const files = await readdir(dir)
    for (const file of files) {
      if (!file.endsWith('.js')) continue
      const id = file.replace(/\.js$/, '')
      const imagePath = imageMap[id]
      if (imagePath) {
        const fullPath = join(dir, file)
        await updateEntryBody(fullPath, imagePath)
      }
      // ALSO process variant replacements + per-entry variant overrides:
      const fullPath = join(dir, file)
      await applyVariantReplacements(fullPath)
      await applyVariantImageOverrides(fullPath, id, VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES[id])
    }
  }
}
```

Note: the `fullPath` declaration moved out of the `if (imagePath)` block so it's available for both the existing `applyVariantReplacements` call AND the new `applyVariantImageOverrides` call. This also fixes a latent issue in the original where `applyVariantReplacements` only ran when the entry had a top-level `imagePath` mapping (silently skipping entries that needed only variant-level fixes).

- [ ] **Step 6: Verify the modified script syntax**

Run:
```bash
node --check scripts/update-library-images.mjs
```

Expected: no output (silent = valid JS). If syntax error, fix before proceeding.

- [ ] **Step 7: Commit Phase C script changes**

```bash
git add scripts/update-library-images.mjs
git commit -m "feat(scripts): add VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES + applyVariantImageOverrides

Sub-Task 7 Phase C: extends update-library-images.mjs with per-entry
variant-anchored image override mechanism. Handles edge case where
multiple variants of the same entry share a placeholder image (Albuterol
oral+inhaled both on tablet-pile-white pre-rebind).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

## Phase E — Validator + Build Gate

### Task E1: Run validator + build to confirm no regressions

**Files:** (no edits — verification only)

- [ ] **Step 1: Run validator**

Run:
```bash
node scripts/validate-library-meta.mjs
```

Expected output (last lines):
```
✓ peptides: 55 entries
✓ nootropics: 48 entries
✓ performance: 68 entries
✓ pharmaceutical: 22 entries
Validation PASS (4 libraries, 193 entries)
```

If FAIL with image-related errors, the new image-paths may not exist on disk — re-verify Phase B file presence.

- [ ] **Step 2: Run production build**

Run:
```bash
npm run build
```

Expected:
- Build completes in <12 seconds (current baseline 5.39s after `v0.24`)
- No new warnings about missing image-paths
- Workbox precache output line shows total size <5120 KiB (current 2998 KiB; 6 new AVIF at ~10-15 KiB each + 6 new WebP at ~25-30 KiB each → +210-270 KiB → expected total ~3210-3270 KiB, well under cap)
- Precache entry count increments by 6 (PWA precaches AVIF or WebP, not PNG; PNG covered by runtime cache)

Look for the line in build output:
```
PWA v1.x.x
  precache  N entries (XXXX.XX KiB)
```

Confirm N = 99 (current 93 + 6 new) and KiB total <5120.

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify EntryImage `<picture>` chain logic intact**

Visual inspection — open the EntryImage component to confirm no edits accidentally crept in:

```bash
git diff src/components/library/EntryImage.jsx
```

Expected: empty diff (file untouched). The 3-source AVIF→WebP→PNG chain is the existing fallback ladder that auto-picks the best supported format per-browser; new files plug in via filename convention only.

- [ ] **Step 4: Spot-check the precache manifest contains new files**

After `npm run build`, run:
```bash
grep -E 'nasal-spray|inhaler-asthma|oral-syringe|transdermal-patch|topical-solution|ampoule-glass' dist/sw.js | head -10
```

Expected: at least 6 hits (matching `.avif` or `.webp` of each new template). If 0 hits, the Workbox glob didn't include `public/performance/`'s new files — investigate `vite.config.js` PWA plugin settings.

## Phase F — Local Smoke Test

### Task F1: Run local dev server, manually verify 3 live-use entries

**Files:** (no edits)

- [ ] **Step 1: Start dev server**

Run (background-able):
```bash
npm run dev
```

Expected: Vite dev server starts on `http://localhost:5173` within 5 seconds.

- [ ] **Step 2: Test Albuterol inhaled-variant**

Open `http://localhost:5173/#entry/performance/albuterol` in browser. Initial view shows oral-variant image (`tablet-pile-white.png`). Click the variant-toggle to switch to "MDI inhaláló" / "inhaled". Verify the hero image swaps to `inhaler-asthma.png/webp/avif`.

If the image does NOT swap, check browser devtools Network tab: look for 404 on `/performance/inhaler-asthma.*`. If 404, the files were not picked up — verify Phase B Task B1 Step 3 again.

- [ ] **Step 3: Test RU58841 default image**

Open `http://localhost:5173/#entry/performance/ru58841`. Hero image should be `topical-solution-clear.png/webp/avif` (NOT `tablet-pile-white.png`). LibraryGallery tile for RU58841 (visible at `http://localhost:5173/#library`) should also show the new image.

- [ ] **Step 4: Test L-Carnitine aq-variant**

Open `http://localhost:5173/#entry/performance/l-carnitine`. Initial view shows oral-variant image (`tablet-pile-white.png`, the entry's defaultVariant). Click the variant-toggle to switch to "IM/SC injekció". Verify the hero image swaps to `ampoule-glass.png/webp/avif`.

- [ ] **Step 5: Test 3 future-use templates render correctly when manually inspected**

Although not wired to any entry, verify the 3 future-use templates load when directly addressed:

Open these URLs in browser:
- `http://localhost:5173/performance/nasal-spray-clear.png`
- `http://localhost:5173/performance/oral-syringe.png`
- `http://localhost:5173/performance/transdermal-patch.png`

Each should display the image (white-bg or black-bg per style family). If 404, the file is not in `public/performance/` — re-run Phase A Step 5.

- [ ] **Step 6: Stop dev server**

Kill the `npm run dev` background process.

## Phase G — Ship + Tag

### Task G1: Push master + tag v0.25-perf-restructure-complete

**Files:** (no edits)

- [ ] **Step 1: Verify clean working tree**

Run:
```bash
git status
```

Expected: clean (3 commits ahead of origin/master: Phase B + Phase C + Phase D). Only pre-existing untracked: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-19-peptide-vial-prompts.md`.

- [ ] **Step 2: Commit the spec + plan + Obsidian mirror references (if not yet committed)**

The spec MD (`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md`) and this plan (`docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md`) need to be in-repo. Check:

```bash
git status docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md
```

If shown as untracked, commit them:
```bash
git add docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md
git commit -m "docs(perf-images): sub-task 7 spec + implementation plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

If already in git history, skip this step.

- [ ] **Step 3: View commits ahead of origin**

Run:
```bash
git log --oneline origin/master..HEAD
```

Expected: 3-5 commits since `v0.24-cross-link-reciprocation` (`2c6a7a5`):
- (optional) docs commit (spec + plan)
- `feat(perf-images): add 6 new image templates`
- `feat(scripts): add VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES + applyVariantImageOverrides`
- `feat(perf-images): rebind RU58841 + Albuterol inhaled + L-Carnitine aq`

- [ ] **Step 4: Push master**

Run:
```bash
git push origin master
```

Expected: push succeeds, Vercel auto-deploy triggers.

- [ ] **Step 5: Create + push annotated tag**

Run:
```bash
git tag -a v0.25-perf-restructure-complete -m "Performance Library Restructure mega-phase COMPLETE

Sub-Task 7: 6 new image templates (nasal-spray, inhaler-asthma,
oral-syringe, transdermal-patch, topical-solution-clear, ampoule-glass)
+ 3 live-use rebinds (RU58841, Albuterol inhaled-variant, L-Carnitine
aq-variant).

Closes Roadmap 2026-06 (all 7 sub-tasks shipped, ~100%)."
git push origin v0.25-perf-restructure-complete
```

Expected: tag pushed, Vercel sees the tag and (optionally) builds a preview deploy with the tag label.

- [ ] **Step 6: Wait ~3 min for Vercel auto-deploy, then verify production**

After ~3 minutes, open production URLs:
- `https://molekulax.vercel.app/#entry/performance/ru58841` → verify topical-solution-clear image
- `https://molekulax.vercel.app/#entry/performance/albuterol` → toggle to inhaled, verify inhaler-asthma image
- `https://molekulax.vercel.app/#entry/performance/l-carnitine` → toggle to aq, verify ampoule-glass image

If any image 404s on production, check Vercel deploy log for the build — most likely a missed file in `public/performance/`.

- [ ] **Step 7: /handoff to update Obsidian status file**

After production verification, invoke `/handoff` slash command to update `MolekulaX_Statusz.md` with the v0.25 ship summary (per CLAUDE.md global protocol).

## Spec Coverage Check (Self-Review)

Cross-checking the plan against `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-sub-task-7-images.md`:

| Spec section | Plan coverage |
|---|---|
| §1 Goal & Scope | Phase A-G entire flow |
| §2 Visual Style Guide (2 families) | Task A1 Step 3+4 reminders + side-by-side check |
| §3.1–3.6 Per-Template Prompts | Task A1 Step 2 (user runs in Gemini) |
| §4 Anti-AI-Slop Guard | Task A1 Step 3 verification, Step 4 side-by-side |
| §5 File-Naming + Drop Location | Task A1 Step 5 + Task B1 (convert pipeline) |
| §6 Script Changes | Task C1 (entire phase) |
| §7 Acceptance Criteria | Phase E (validator + build) + Phase F (smoke) |
| §8 Risk & Rollback | Inline mitigations: Task A1 anti-slop checks (R1), Task E1 Step 2 precache check (R2), Task D1 Step 6 critical edge-case check (R3), Task G1 Step 6 production verify (R4) |
| §9 Out-of-Spec Defer | Not in plan (correctly deferred) |
| §10 References | Not in plan (informational only) |

**Gap check:** None. All in-scope spec items have a corresponding task.

**Placeholder scan:** Searched plan for "TBD", "TODO", "fill in", "appropriate error handling", "similar to". Zero matches.

**Type consistency:** `VARIANT_IMAGE_OVERRIDES` const name, `applyVariantImageOverrides` function name, `imagePath`/`newImagePath`/`overrides` parameter names — all consistent across Task C1 Step 3-5 and referenced consistently in verification grep commands.

## Out-of-Spec Items Confirmed NOT in Plan

These items were explicitly deferred during brainstorming (§9 of spec):
- Per-entry dedicated images for 14 v0.22 Sub-Task 6 entries (separate multi-week effort)
- Peptide library nasal-spray multi-variant addition (uses `nasal-spray-clear.png` template in a future session once peptide entries are written)
- Pharmaceutical library image upgrade
- Lighthouse 3-run median GH-Action
- AVIF Q-tuning per asset-class

Do not add tasks for these — they belong in their own future plans.
